message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 - Shuffle Service Token Flow

participant "Client\n(c)" as c
participant "Resource\nManager\n(rm)" as rm
participant "Node\nManager\n(nm)" as nm
participant "Shuffle\nHandler\n(ss)" as ss

participant "File\nSystem\n(fs)" as fs

== Bootstrap ==

== Job Definition ==

c -> rm : 1 **createJob** [...] ()\n: job-id

c -> c : **createShuffleToken**\n2 ( shfl-tkn-mk )\n: shfl-tkn

c <- c : **serializeTokens**\n3 ( shfl-tkn, ... )\n: c-tokens{shfl-tkn,...}

== Job Submission ==

c -> rm : **submitApplication**\n4 [...]\n( job-id, c-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )\n: app-rpt{clnt-tkn}

== Job Initiation ==

rm -> nm : **startContainer**\n5 [...]\n( c-tokens{shfl-tkn},svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )

nm -> nm : 6 **initApp**\n( job-id, shfl-tkn )

create participant "Application\nMaster\n(am)" as am
nm -> am : 7 exec

nm -> nm : **startContainer**\n8 [...]\n( svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )

create participant "Application\nContainer\n(ac)" as ac #Red
nm -> ac : 9 exec

create participant "Task\n(t)" as t #Orange
ac -> t : 10 exec

== Map Task Execution ==

t -> fs : 11 writeShuffleData[]();

== Reduce Task Execution ==

t -> ss : 12 **readShuffleData** [SDT:shfl-tkn] {...}: shfl-data

ss -> nm : 13 **readShuffleData**

nm --> t : 14 shfl-data

== Job Completion ==

@enduml
```
